result.stderr:
scaffer 0.2.3+b0e6f042028883945dcc0c0140b4f8746cec4b32
Copyright (C) 2026 David Carroll

  -g, --generator           (Default: mssql) The generator to use while
                            generating (mssql, postgres). Defaults to mssql.

  -t, --tableName           The table from which to create the class.

  -c, --connectionString    Required. The connection string to a SQL Server
                            database. Required.

  -p, --path                The path to which to save the class.

  -n, --namespace           The namespace in which the class will be created.
                            Defaults to a name based on the database.

  -f, --force               Force the file to be created, overwriting an
                            existing file if necessary.

  -e, --extensions          Create class extensions for CRUD operations.

  -d, --delete              Delete existing classes prior to generation

  --help                    Display this help screen.

  --version                 Display version information.
